text: AI is changing the way we think about creativity. Today, AI can generate art, compose music, and even write stories. These creations are often impressive and can look or sound very human. For example, some AI paintings have been sold at famous auctions. However, human creativity comes from personal experience, emotion, and intention. Machines do not feel joy or sadness; they simply follow patterns and data. While AI can mimic creative works, it lacks the deep human connection behind them. Many artists now use AI as a tool to inspire new ideas, blending machine output with human imagination. The real question is not whether AI can be creative, but how humans and machines can create together.
